law: To let people get to your content more directly, your app should save shared login information where it can access the credentials regardless of the current user, and your code should also remember which profile to load for each user.
It also checks before saving to avoid remembering the selected profile in case there aren’t multiple users on the Apple TV.
To avoid having each user sign in individually, tvOS 16 adds a new Keychain API: .
The method in the shows how to use the above to read the username and password from the Keychain: You can also use the same to save a new item with username and password.
You must run this sample code project on a physical device.
